scripts.deploy: npm --workspace=infra run build && npm --workspace=infra run cdk -- deploy
scripts.deploy:dev: [ -f .env ] && export $(cat .env | xargs) || true && npm --workspace=angular run build:development && aws s3 sync angular/dist/expense-tracker/browser s3://$S3_BUCKET_NAME --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $CLOUDFRONT_DISTRIBUTION_ID --paths '/*'
